creator: shigio@tamacom.com
text:
> >		http://www.tamacom.com/global/global-3.56.tar.gz
> 
> There is nothing mentioned about version 3.56... only 4.0 (New GPLed
> version) is announced. However, that file is actually exists and it is
> *not* the same of 4.0 (I've fetched 3.56 and 4.0 and confirmed with
> diff(1) command).

When I decided to make GPLed GLOBAL, I promised to FreeBSD community
that I will also support BSD licensed GLOBAL as a bug fix version.

> Anyway, we have ports/devel/global. Here is a patch to update version
> 3.56 (PORTVERSION, MASTER_SITES, and MD5 checksum was changed.)
> 
> BTW, maybe this PR should be categorized as 'ports'.

If you include version 3.56 as a port then you had better include
version 4.0 instead. I didn't know the existence of 'ports global'.
My intention is to replace /usr/src/contrib/global/ with version 3.56.
--
Shigio Yamaguchi - Tama Communications Corporation
Mail: shigio@tamacom.com, (Spare mail: shigio@pluto.dti.ne.jp)
